@startuml
skinparam UMLClassDiagram font "Segoe UI"

class IconUtility {
    <<static>>
    IconUtility

    <<readonly>>
    k_LightIconResourcePath : string = "SkinningModule/Icons/Light"

    <<readonly>>
    k_DarkIconResourcePath : string = "SkinningModule/Icons/Dark"

    <<readonly>>
    k_SelectedResourceIconPath : string = "SkinningModule/Icons/Selected"

    LoadIconResource(name : string, personalPath : string, proPath : string) : Texture2D
}

@enduml
